# Launcher(non-an):
```fd24 30 30 a8 9f 30 30 e0 a0 30 30 34 7b 31 30 80 30
e6 e9 d4 76 31 30 da 7b 31 30 fe02 e0 e9 30 d7 2e d7 32 
89 31 30 30 30 74 1f 32 48```


Các hex cần gán là: FD24, 9F, A0, 80, E9, E9, 1F

# Token:
```@ 0 0 × @ 0 0 𝗚 or 0 0 4 cos⁻¹( 1 0 @ 0 𝗽 ▸Simp ⁻¹ ³√( 1 0 ʳ cos⁻¹( 1 0 cm▸in 𝗚 ▸Simp 0 % . % 2 LCM( 1 0 0 0 √( @ 2 𝑥```

Chế: @fongka510
